violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Counter under matting build-up of debris and needs cleaning.
Sanitizing solution testing devices. — --Test strip or kit that accurately measures the sanitizing concentration was not provided. Test strips needed for Quat base sanitizer used for 3 tub sink.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floor needs cleaning in BOH storage area and FOH under mats.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Floor vinyl peeling/damaged at ice machine floor drain.
Storage and handling of maintenance items. — --Wet-use maintenance items, such as mops, were not placed in a position that allows proper air-drying. Store mop in a position that allows proper drying.
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Properly designed, located, constructed, operated, maintained, cleaned and chemical test kit provided (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
